summary: Tested all 6 features: (1) Admin Mining Settings save/persist, (2) Admin Referral Bonus Settings save/persist, (3) User Mining Rate with referral breakdown, (4) Referral Page level-wise breakdown with session status, (5) Live Referral Bonus Speed section, (6) Marathi to English conversion. All backend tests passed (9/9). Fixed Marathi text in AdminSystemSettings.js.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSystemSettings.js: Mining Formula tab correctly saves base_rate, vip_multiplier, max_daily_mining_hours, prc_to_inr_ratio to database via POST /api/admin/mining-settings
AdminSystemSettings.js: Referral Bonus tab correctly saves level_1 through level_5 percentages via POST /api/admin/referral-bonus-settings
AdminSystemSettings.js: FIXED - Converted Marathi text to English in Referral Bonus tab description and 'How it works' section
Referrals.js: Live Referral Bonus Speed section shows PRC/hr per level with active count × percentage calculation
Referrals.js: User list shows session status ('● Session Active' / '○ No Session') based on mining_active and mining_session_end
Referrals.js: All text uses language context with English as default - no hardcoded Marathi text
server.py: /api/admin/mining-settings GET/POST endpoints correctly read/write to settings collection
server.py: /api/admin/referral-bonus-settings GET/POST endpoints with validation (0-100 range, all 5 levels required)
server.py: /api/mining/status/{uid} returns referral_breakdown with level-wise count, percentage, and bonus
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features verified working: (1) Admin Mining Settings at /admin/settings/system -> Mining Formula tab saves base_rate, vip_multiplier, max_daily_mining_hours, prc_to_inr_ratio and persists after reload. (2) Admin Referral Bonus Settings at /admin/settings/system -> Referral Bonus tab saves level_1-level_5 percentages and persists. (3) Mining status API /api/mining/status/{uid} returns referral_breakdown with level-wise data. (4) Referrals page shows level-wise breakdown with Total/Active count per level. (5) Live Referral Bonus Speed section shows PRC/hr per level. (6) All Marathi text converted to English in AdminSystemSettings.js.

features: Your Network section with Total/Active per level
